description_long: This is a compact, two-seater sofa upholstered in a warm mustard-yellow material, likely leather or faux leather, with a smooth and slightly glossy finish. The sofa features two large, plush seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all of which appear to be attached and uniformly sized. The armrests are rounded and padded, rising to the same height as the backrest and curving gently outward for a soft, inviting profile. The back of the sofa is flat and unadorned, maintaining a clean and modern silhouette. The sofa stands on four short, block-style legs, which are dark in color and slightly recessed, giving the piece a grounded yet subtly elevated appearance.
description: A mustard-yellow, two-seater sofa with plush, attached cushions, rounded padded armrests, and short, dark block legs. The upholstery is smooth and slightly glossy, giving it a modern, inviting look.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat and back cushions, rounded armrests, and the inviting, plush seating area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, padded armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, unadorned backrest and the sofa's clean, modern lines.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the armrest's rounded profile and the sofa's compact depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached seat cushions and two matching attached backrest cushions, all uniform in size and shape, forming a symmetrical arrangement.
attribute_armrest_style: Rounded, padded armrests that rise to the same height as the backrest, curving gently outward with a soft, inviting profile and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, dark in color, slightly recessed, and likely made of wood or metal with a simple, sturdy appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two attached, plush cushions, continuous across the width of the sofa and lacking decorative tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid mustard-yellow upholstery with a smooth, slightly glossy finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
